articles.author: Bob Van Voris
articles.title: Three Charged by US With Plot to Illegally Send AI Tech to China - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: The US charged a Super Micro Computer Inc. co-founder with illegally diverting billions of dollars in Nvidia Corp.-powered servers to China, initiating its highest-profile case against alleged smuggling of restricted AI technology to the Asian country.
